title: Asset Library
subtitle: One place to manage the images, videos and text you collect in the Creative Workshop — upload, group, tag, batch-organize and reuse.

moveModal.title: Move to collection
moveModal.label: Target collection
moveModal.placeholder: Pick or type a collection; leave empty to ungroup

tagModal.title: Add tags in bulk
tagModal.label: Tags
tagModal.placeholder: Type a tag and press Enter

renameCollection.title: Rename collection
renameCollection.label: New collection name
renameCollection.required: Please enter a new collection name

removeConfirm.title: Remove from library
removeConfirm.content: The {{count}} selected items will be removed from the library and no longer shown here. Any not used by a canvas may be reclaimed by later cleanup. Continue?

deleteConfirm.title: Delete assets
deleteConfirm.content: Permanently delete the {{count}} selected items? This cannot be undone.
